name: Silt Domain Spells
description:
Silt Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Inflict Wounds, Silt Horror's Grasp (rework of Arms of Hadar), Blindness/Deafness, Ray of Enfeeblement
Tier 2: Hunger of Hadar, Vampiric Touch
Tier 3: Blight, Shadow of Moil
Tier 4: Blight of the Ash Wastes (rename of Contagion), Enervation
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
